summary: Frontend-only testing of mumble LIGHT theme redesign. All 25+ UI tests passed (100%). Light warm #f8f7f4 background correctly applied to Chat, Dashboard, and Vocabulary pages. All components verified: Sidebar with light indigo gradient (#eef2ff to #c7d2fe), ChatHeader with glass effect (rgba(248,247,244,0.88)), ChatInput with white textarea and indigo gradient buttons, ChatBubble with user=indigo gradient and AI=white+border, MessageList with mesh blobs and floating script chars, Dashboard with colorful stat cards (green #d1fae5, blue #bfdbfe, pink #fecdd3, violet #e9d5ff), Vocabulary with warm background and colorful word cards.
passed_tests: Chat page loads with light warm background (#f8f7f4 = rgb(248,247,244))
Chat page has data-testid='chat-page'
Sidebar renders with light indigo gradient background (#eef2ff to #c7d2fe)
Sidebar shows mumble logo with indigo-600 WaveformLogo
Sidebar shows 'I SPEAK' native language picker (white/light bg with indigo accents)
Sidebar shows 'LEARN' target language picker (indigo-50 bg)
New Chat dropdown opens with Free Conversation and 8 scenarios
Sidebar shows conversation list with white bg and shadow for active conv
Sidebar footer shows Dashboard, Vocabulary links
Sidebar footer shows user email and Logout button
ChatHeader displays with light glass effect (rgba(248,247,244,0.88) + blur(16px))
ChatHeader shows back button, conversation title, badges
Mode toggle visible with mic/keyboard buttons
Mode toggle voice button has indigo gradient (#4338ca to #6366f1) when active
Mode toggle text button has indigo gradient when active
ChatInput voice mode shows indigo gradient mic button with glow shadow
ChatInput text mode shows white textarea with animated focus ring
Send button shows indigo gradient when text is entered
Empty chat state shows floating mesh blobs (visible against #f8f7f4 bg)
Empty state shows floating script characters (あ, ñ, 한, etc.)
Quick prompts in text mode have white bg with slate-200 border and indigo hover
Sending text message works - user message in indigo gradient bubble
AI response displayed in white bubble with #e5e7eb border
Dashboard page loads at /dashboard with #f8f7f4 background
Dashboard stat cards: Conversations (#d1fae5 green), Messages (#bfdbfe blue), Streak (#fecdd3 pink), Words (#e9d5ff violet)
Dashboard Tools Used section has blue background (#bfdbfe)
Dashboard Scenarios Practiced section has violet background (#e9d5ff)
Dashboard Recent Activity section has amber background (#fed7aa)
Dashboard has floating mesh gradient blobs and script characters
Vocabulary page loads at /vocabulary with #f8f7f4 background
Vocabulary page has Add Word dialog with clean light styling
Language picker dropdown has white bg with indigo highlights
Mobile responsive - sidebar slides in/out properly
critical_code_review_comments: Light warm #f8f7f4 theme successfully applied across all internal pages - matching landing page aesthetic
Colorful section cards on Dashboard match landing page sections: green (#d1fae5), blue (#bfdbfe), violet (#e9d5ff), amber (#fed7aa)
Indigo gradient (#4338ca to #6366f1) used consistently for primary actions/buttons
Glass morphism effect correctly uses light base (rgba(248,247,244,0.88) + blur)
Framer Motion animations present for mesh blobs, floating chars, bubbles
Mobile responsive design works with sidebar overlay
context_for_next_testing_agent: LIGHT theme redesign complete and verified. Key color values: Main bg #f8f7f4, Sidebar gradient #eef2ff to #c7d2fe, Glass rgba(248,247,244,0.88), User bubble gradient #4338ca to #6366f1, AI bubble white with #e5e7eb border. Dashboard cards: green #d1fae5, blue #bfdbfe, pink #fecdd3, violet #e9d5ff, amber #fed7aa. Voice recording NOT tested (requires mic). Test account: testuser2@example.com / password123
